refnamediv.refpurpose: The type representing a 3-dimensional bounding box.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: box3d is a PostGIS spatial data type used to represent the three-dimensional bounding box enclosing a geometry or collection of geometries. For example, the aggregate function returns a box3d object.
The representation contains the values xmin, ymin, zmin, xmax, ymax, zmax. These are the minimum and maximum values of the X, Y and Z extents.
box3d objects have a text representation which looks like BOX3D(1 2 3,5 6 5).

refsection.title: Casting Behavior
refsection.para: This table lists the automatic and explicit casts allowed for this data type:
